title: senecio crassifolius
intro: Senecio crassifolius, also known as the Broad-leaved Ragwort, is a perennial plant species belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Senecio crassifolius include its ability to treat skin conditions, wounds, and respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, or used to make a salve or ointment for topical application.
